creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
Sorry, that was clearly the wrong patch. Here's the correct one:

Index: distinfo
===================================================================
--- distinfo    (revision 303269)
+++ distinfo    (working copy)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (rubygem/image_science-1.2.1.gem) =
1d7b973baad4f313105ab2643f28412ae2e187ad0ea3e68093950ef46fe53113
-SIZE (rubygem/image_science-1.2.1.gem) = 11264
+SHA256 (rubygem/image_science-1.2.3.gem) =
aa2c3054676a7ab1f0a171381fe58e7654e8a72835c5b3b9c3d1ddff8bcb68e7
+SIZE (rubygem/image_science-1.2.3.gem) = 14336
Index: Makefile
===================================================================
--- Makefile    (revision 303269)
+++ Makefile    (working copy)
@@ -6,8 +6,7 @@
 #

 PORTNAME=      image_science
-PORTVERSION=   1.2.1
-PORTREVISION=  1
+PORTVERSION=   1.2.3
 CATEGORIES=    graphics rubygems
 MASTER_SITES=  RG


Steve
